Our Professional Security Services

Comprehensive security solutions tailored to your specific needs

View Services Call Now: 03 7064 8292

Security Solutions

We provide a wide range of professional security services to protect your business, assets and people

Static Guarding

Professional security personnel stationed at your premises to monitor, patrol and protect your property 24/7.

  • 24/7 on-site security personnel
  • Access control management
  • Emergency response coordination
  • Regular patrols and surveillance
Learn More

Mobile Patrols

Regular, randomised patrols of your property to deter criminal activity and ensure comprehensive security coverage.

  • Randomised patrol schedules
  • GPS-tracked patrol vehicles
  • Property inspections and reports
  • Rapid incident response
Learn More

Corporate Security

Specialised security solutions for corporate environments including executive protection and risk assessment.

  • Executive protection services
  • Risk assessment and management
  • Employee safety training
Learn More

Cash In Transit

Secure transportation of cash and valuables with highly trained security personnel.

  • GPS tracking and monitoring
  • Incident response planning
Learn More

Alarm Responses

24/7 rapid response to alarm activations with immediate dispatch of security professionals to your location.

  • 24/7 monitoring centre
  • Average rapid response time
  • Keyholding services
  • Incident documentation
Learn More

Event Security

Specialised security services for events of all sizes to ensure safety and smooth operations.

  • Crowd management and control
  • VIP protection services
  • Emergency evacuation planning
  • Access control and screening
Learn More

Construction Site Security

Specialised security solutions for construction site to prevent theft, vandalism and ensure safety compliance.

  • 24/7 site security personnel
  • Access control for workers and vehicles
  • Theft and vandalism prevention
  • Safety compliance monitoring
Learn More

Commercial Site Security

Security services tailored for retail and commercial properties to prevent loss and ensure a safe environment.

  • Retail security specialists
  • Loss prevention strategies
  • Customer and staff safety
  • After-hours security patrols
Learn More

Manufacturing & Warehousing Security

Comprehensive security for manufacturing plants and warehouses to protect assets, inventory and personnel.

  • Inventory protection
  • Access control systems
  • Perimeter security
  • Surveillance monitoring
Learn More

Ready to Secure Your Business?

Contact us today for a free security assessment and customised quote

Call Now: 03 7064 8292 Request a Quote

Broadsafe Services Security acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of the land on which we work and live and recognise their continuing connection to land, sea and culture. We pay respect to Elders past, present, emerging and extend that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander people around the country.

Keeping You Safe, 24/7

Providing professional security solutions across Australia with 24/7 availability and rapid response.
